findings.description: The source h2 section '使用方法' contains >= 2000 chars of plain text and has two h3 subsections ('データベースに対するトランザクション制御' and 'データベースに対するトランザクションタイムアウトを適用する'), but the knowledge file does not split them into separate sections — all content is merged into s3.
findings.source_evidence: RST h3 headings: 'データベースに対するトランザクション制御' (~~) and 'データベースに対するトランザクションタイムアウトを適用する' (~~) under h2 '使用方法'

findings.description: s4 hints are missing 'transactionFactory', which is a property name explicitly used in the TransactionManagementHandler XML configuration example in this section.
findings.source_evidence: <property name="transactionFactory"> in the TransactionManagementHandler component definition XML under 拡張例

findings.description: s3 hints are missing 'setQueryTimeout' (from java.sql.Statement#setQueryTimeout), which is explicitly referenced in the source as the mechanism used for query timeout handling within transaction timeout.
findings.source_evidence: Source text: 'トランザクションタイムアウトの残り秒数を `java.sql.Statement#setQueryTimeout` に設定し'
